product_overview: PotenHire is a job hiring platform tailored for Korean-speaking foreigners, connecting talented foreign job seekers proficient in Korean with verified employers offering relevant job opportunities in Korea.
core_goals: Enable seamless authentication and role-based onboarding for seekers and employers.
Provide an intuitive interface for job seekers to browse, filter, and apply for jobs.
Facilitate employers in creating, managing, and monitoring job postings effectively.
Offer a central user profile area for seekers and employers to manage their information and saved jobs.
Ensure robust admin oversight for job post approval and platform metrics management.
key_features: Google OAuth-based authentication integrated with Supabase Auth for secure login and easy onboarding.
Dynamic landing page showcasing platform stats, introduction, and latest job posts.
Role-specific onboarding flows collecting relevant profile data for seekers (nationality, TOPIK level, occupation) and employers (company name).
Comprehensive job listings with filters by nationality, work location type, and country, plus sorting by latest and popularity.
Detailed job pages including descriptions, company info, apply/save/share options.
User profile page allowing editing personal info, managing liked jobs, and account settings.
Employer dashboard for creating and managing job posts with status toggling and view statistics.
Admin dashboard for managing users and job posts ensuring quality and relevance.
user_flow_summary: User registration via Google OAuth leading to role selection and onboarding.
Job seekers browsing job listings with filter and sort functionalities, viewing details, and applying or saving jobs.
Employers creating and submitting new job posts followed by admin approval and publishing.
Users managing personal profiles, viewing liked jobs, and adjusting settings on their My Page.
validation_criteria: Successful Google OAuth login and role-based onboarding workflow.
Accurate filtering, sorting, and pagination of job listings.
Correct display of job details and apply/save/share functionality.
Employer job post creation, editing and status management working as intended.
Admin approval flow correctly controls job post visibility.
User profile updates persist and reflect immediately.
Responsive design and accessibility standards met across all pages.

code_summary.description: A job hiring platform for Korean-speaking foreigners. Connects foreign talent who can speak Korean with verified job postings from employers.
